customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, working well, and appreciate its ease of use and professional installation process. Moreover, they consider it an affordable water purifier with amazing water quality after purification, and one customer mentions it saves money on canned or packaged water. However, opinions about service are mixed, with some customers reporting very bad service while others find it satisfactory.

reviews.author: ANU
reviews.title: Average Poor RO
reviews.body: Average RO low build quality. things are packed u cant see how many filters, as they claim 9 stage. all marketting gimmicks. The ad on Amazon what written on Box & finally inside all vary. Main dhanda is to sell some accessory in double price in cash with no bill. email id in app is fake does not work. water tank cover is not properly sealed some dust or liquid if dropped on top easily go in it. Eureka Forbes has become Sadakchaap like other Thousands of AQUA***** type companies who give RO in 3000-4000. so it is same item but they cash on brand name & marketting of Nano pure. There installati

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Worth product
reviews.body: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Good product. Installation was done on time, and the water tastes clean. The purifier looks good and is easy to use. Happy with the purchase. Worth the price.

reviews.author: Divya Anand
reviews.title: Product is good but not happy with the feedback calls
reviews.body: The product is really good, but the only problem I have is, why is amazon or seller (not sure who is responsible) always forcing for the feedback. Isn't it voluntary, I got call multiple times for feedback. This is not a good practice and harrasment of customer. I am not saying one should not ask for feedback but reminding one time is fine, if I have to give feedback I will give if not I will not.

reviews.author: Ali
reviews.title: Quality and After sales Service.
reviews.body: I am delighted to have Aquaguard and the particular model which i have chosen. It was installed on time, funtions well and I am pleased with overall performance and support.

reviews.author: Shai
reviews.title: Worth buying. Free installation was quick and good technician sent by the company.
reviews.body: Good product so far. Have used it only a few days, so far so good. We have used an RO system from Eureka Forbes in the past as well and had a good experience. This one came in one day after ordering and was installed within 48 hrs. Good experience with installation as well.
